name: attendance-leaveflow-unified-root
description: Root-level unified workspace for Attendance + LeaveFlow integration

scripts.install:all: npm run install:attendance && npm run install:leaveflow:dashboard && npm run install:leaveflow:backend
scripts.dev:attendance: npm run sync:common && npm --prefix Attendace_system-main run dev
scripts.build: npm run sync:common && npm --prefix Attendace_system-main run build
scripts.lint: npm run sync:common && npm --prefix Attendace_system-main run lint
scripts.seed:admin: npm run sync:common && npm --prefix Attendace_system-main run seed:admin
